title: Ranger (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Ranger''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

Shortly after the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brigia]], the commanding officer of [[Operation Strike Fear]], realizing that [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] resistance was stronger than expected called for reinforcements before a planned attack on [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]]. The ''Ranger'' was sent to reinforce the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] and its [[Task force/Legends|task force]] and was tasked with escorting a [[Juno (freighter group)|group]] of [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] to resupply ''Invincible'' on the way.

After arriving at the transfer point, the convoy was ambushed by a Rebel strike force. Two [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Sunnar Jan-lo]] arrived first and drew off the convoy's escort. Farlander immediately fired all of his [[Proton torpedo/Legends|proton torpedoes]] at ''Ranger'', destroying the corvette. Two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] arrived shortly after and attacked the now defenseless convoy.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
